name: linSlFSMSetStTO
title: linSlFSMSetStTO
syntax: void linSlFSMSetStTO (unsigned int slaveId, unsigned int stateId, unsigned int timeout, unsigned int followUpState);
description: Sets a timeout for the state specified by stateId of the Slave with the identifier slaveId.

parameters.name: slaveId
parameters.description: Identifier of the relevant Slave. Corresponds to the slaveId, that was defined with linSlSimulate.
